---
title: "Muddy Points"
subtitle: "Lesson 17: Missing data"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Muddy Points from Spring 2025

### Getting the M-acronyms and their consequences correct! I keep trying to think of replacement acronyms. "Can be explained with existing data", "Cannot be explained with missing data?"
